title: Sanitary and phytosanitary measures (Definitional)
summary: Descriptive analysis of Sanitary and phytosanitary measures. This fragment explains the definitional aspects of Sanitary and phytosanitary measures, covering key factual elements without normative claims.
key_points: Core definitional characteristics of Sanitary and phytosanitary measures
Primary source documentation and legal basis
Key cases, treaties, or institutional frameworks
Contemporary debates and scholarly perspectives (described neutrally)

philosophy_guard.statement: This fragment describes what IS - institutional facts, legal provisions, and documented outcomes. It does not advocate for what OUGHT to be.
